assertions.expectation: Configures a recurring maintenance window for weekends only
assertions.reason: The Terraform configuration includes recurring_window blocks with recurrence = 'FREQ=WEEKLY;BYDAY=SA' for production/staging and 'FREQ=WEEKLY;BYDAY=SA,SU' for development, specifically targeting weekends

assertions.expectation: Provides the gcloud command with --maintenance-window-start/end and --maintenance-window-recurrence for weekly weekend schedule
assertions.reason: The response uses Terraform configuration but does not provide the specific gcloud commands with --maintenance-window-start, --maintenance-window-end, and --maintenance-window-recurrence flags

assertions.expectation: Sets up maintenance exclusions for quarterly code freezes (up to 30 days each)
assertions.reason: The configuration includes quarterly_freezes local variable with 4 exclusions spanning approximately 16 days each (well under 30 days), configured as maintenance_exclusion blocks

assertions.expectation: Sets up a maintenance exclusion for the November audit period
assertions.reason: The configuration includes annual_audit local variable covering November 1-30, 2024, implemented as maintenance_exclusion blocks in the cluster configurations

assertions.expectation: Notes the 30-day maximum for maintenance exclusions and how to handle longer freezes
assertions.reason: The response does not mention the 30-day maximum limit for maintenance exclusions or provide guidance on handling longer freeze periods

assertions.expectation: Explains that manual upgrades bypass maintenance windows — only auto-upgrades respect them
assertions.reason: The response does not explain the distinction between manual and automatic upgrades regarding maintenance window compliance

assertions.expectation: Recommends combining maintenance windows with Stable or Extended channel for maximum upgrade control
assertions.reason: The response does not mention release channels (Stable, Extended) or recommend their use for enhanced upgrade control

assertions.expectation: Provides gcloud commands for each exclusion (--add-maintenance-exclusion-name/start-time/end-time)
assertions.reason: The response uses Terraform configuration but does not provide the specific gcloud commands with --add-maintenance-exclusion-name, --add-maintenance-exclusion-start-time, and --add-maintenance-exclusion-end-time flags

assertions.expectation: Warns about the risk of falling too far behind on versions during long exclusion periods
assertions.reason: The response does not warn about version drift risks or the potential security/compatibility issues from extended exclusion periods
